en.title: A single path from template to PDF.

steps.title: Model + author
steps.body: Define input variables per template, manage variants, and drag blocks in the visual editor with live PDF preview.

steps.title: Promote + govern
steps.body: Freeze versions, assign them to staging/production environments, and gate releases behind reviewer approvals per tenant.

steps.title: Render + deliver
steps.body: Call the REST API or batch jobs, render PDFs in milliseconds, then push artifacts via storage adapters or webhooks.

nl.title: Een enkel pad van template naar PDF.

steps.title: Modelleer + ontwerp
steps.body: Definieer input variabelen per template, beheer varianten, en sleep blokken in de visuele editor met live PDF preview.

steps.title: Promoveer + beheer
steps.body: Bevries versies, wijs ze toe aan staging/productie omgevingen, en bewaak releases met reviewer goedkeuringen per tenant.

steps.title: Render + lever
steps.body: Roep de REST API of batch jobs aan, render PDF's in milliseconden, en push artifacts via storage adapters of webhooks.
